hero.headline:
Your finances,
finally intelligent.
hero.subheadline: EXPOZOR understands your money the way you do — automatically. Scan receipts, sync banks, split with your household, and let AI handle the rest.
hero.waitlistSuccess: You're on the list! Check your inbox.

step2.label: AI categorizes it
step2.message: Categorized as Food & Drink with 97% confidence.

features.title: Everything your money needs
features.subtitle: Built for the way you actually spend — not the way a spreadsheet thinks you do.

scan.title: Snap & done
scan.description: Point your camera at any receipt. On-device OCR extracts every line item in under two seconds.

import.title: CSV import
import.description: Import transactions from any bank's CSV export. Map columns once, then import again in seconds.

ai.title: AI that learns you
ai.description: The more you use EXPOZOR, the smarter it gets. Rules you set, patterns it finds, insights that surprise.

budgets.title: Budgets that flex
budgets.description: Zero-based, envelope, or simple limits. Multi-currency rollups. Forecasts that adapt to your income.

share.title: Shared finances
share.description: Track shared household expenses manually. Assign expenses to members and see how costs are split.

security.title: Built with security in mind
security.description: HTTPS in transit. No bank credentials collected. No money movement. See our Security page for details.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.

plus.name: Plus
plus.description: For people serious about their finances.

items.a: EXPOZOR uses HTTPS for all data in transit. We do not sell your data, and you can request deletion of your account and data at any time. Additional security details are on our Security page.

items.q: Do I need to connect my bank?
items.a: No. EXPOZOR does not require a bank connection. You add expenses manually, by uploading a receipt or screenshot, or by importing a CSV file.

items.q: How does the AI categorization work?
items.a: Your own rules run first. If a rule matches, no AI is used. For unknowns, Claude Haiku classifies in batch. Results with confidence below 60% are flagged for your review — we never auto-apply uncertain categories.

items.q: Can I share expenses with my household?
items.a: Shared expense tracking is a planned feature. You can split expenses across household members manually. Automatic money transfer or settlement between users is not supported.

items.q: What happens if I want to cancel?
items.a: Cancel anytime, no friction. You keep your data in Free tier. A full export is always one click away.
